notes:
Home page rebuild — fixes the cramped, mis-scaled Home (Home Build Spec v1).

**Fixes & polish**

- **Home now uses the full width of the window** instead of being squeezed into
  the narrow note-reading column, so the two-column layout (notes on the left,
  calendar on the right) finally has room to breathe.
- The **month calendar no longer clips** — every day of the week, including
  Sunday, is always fully visible.
- Home **reflows cleanly as the window narrows**: two columns → a single column
  with a compact week strip under the greeting → progressively tighter spacing,
  with the recent-note snippets dropping before anything overflows.
- The **greeting no longer wraps to two lines**, and the recent list never
  scrolls sideways.
- Pinned notes are a tidy two-up card grid; the "Pick up where you left off"
  card, the calendar, and the today's-journal card all match the design.
